stemHtml: During a radar approach, you are in a right turn from 210° onto North. The controller now wants you on heading 335°. What instruction would you expect?

options.a: G-ACZG, FOLLOW HEADING THREE THREE FIVE DEGREES.
options.b: G-ACZG, STOP TURN HEADING THREE THREE FIVE DEGREES.
options.c: G-ACZG, MODIFY HEADING THREE THREE FIVE DEGREES.
options.d: G-ACZG, LEAVE THREE SIX ZERO DEGREES HEADING THREE THREE FIVE DEGREES.
